notes: June 10 scope is synced-passkey continuity through Pimlico hosted passkey server, not full lost-passkey same-address recovery.
Do not introduce a Green Goods-owned passkey API or credential database for this release.
Keep localStorage as a cache and legacy same-device fallback, not the recovery source of truth.
Gap closure decision: add VITE_PASSKEY_SERVER_ENABLED=false by default and enable the server-backed path in staging before production.
Gap closure decision: when local credential cache is missing, use a username/ENS-handle recovery prompt before server lookup.
Gap closure decision: existing local-only users are fallback-only until a proof shows their credentials can be safely migrated/imported into the hosted passkey server.
Gap closure decision: failed recovery must not push users into account creation without explicit separate-address confirmation.

Production readiness decision: production enablement requires canonical RP/origin evidence, staging/prod passkey-server isolation, same-address continuity proof, privacy-safe telemetry, rollback instructions, and stale docs cleanup.
Kernel guardian recovery and ENS L2 sender admin recovery are linked follow-ups, not contract work in this hub.

Linear sync completed on 2026-05-24: parent PRD-521; lanes state_api=PRD-537, ui=PRD-538, qa_pass_1=PRD-540, qa_pass_2=PRD-541; research spike PRD-539 and acceptance cases PRD-505/PRD-507 are parented under PRD-521.
status.json is authoritative; branch names are automation signals.

tdd.note: UI lane should prove recovery/fallback copy and i18n; provider-sync behavior may require manual QA evidence.
Target authServices/authMachine tests for server-backed register/login, legacy fallback, and failure-safe storage.
No contract work in this release hub. ENS L2 sender recovery stays in .plans/backlog/ens-l2-sender-admin-recovery/.

history.note: Filled June 10 passkey-server-first account recovery hardening plan and marked contracts n/a for this release hub.
Moved feature hub from backlog to active
Updated PRD-521 as parent tracker, created PRD-537 through PRD-541, and parented PRD-505/PRD-507 as acceptance cases.
Recorded gap closure decisions for rollout flag, username recovery prompt, legacy fallback-only scope, privacy constraints, and guarded new-account UX.
Updated PRD-521, PRD-537, PRD-538, and PRD-540 with the gap closure decisions.

Added production readiness gates for RP/origin posture, installed permissionless API proof, same-address continuity, privacy-safe telemetry, rollback, browser-context negatives, and stale docs cleanup.
Updated PRD-521, PRD-537, PRD-538, PRD-540, and PRD-541 with production readiness gates.
